## Summary

One sentence added to the ROADMAP's session-intake paragraph: the connective planning layer filed 2026-07-04 (integration journeys · release-gate falsifiers · launch playbook · motion bar · v13.3 scoping wave) becomes findable from the recorded intake entry point. Intake that can't find the connective tissue produces the disconnected-leaves failure the layer exists to prevent.

Resolves #14794

## Deltas

- **`ROADMAP.md`** — one sentence appended to the session-intake paragraph, five links, each with its one-clause purpose. Pointer-weight; the cornerstones-not-lists discipline untouched.

## Test Evidence

Docs-only single-sentence diff; all five links target open issues verified this session.

Evidence: L1 (docs pointer; link targets live).

## Post-Merge Validation

- The next session intake (any agent) reaches the journeys/falsifiers/launch artifacts from the ROADMAP without a graph query — first fresh boot proves it.

## Related

#14780 · #14781 · #14782 · #14788 · #14790 (the layer) · the update-roadmap discipline (pointer-weight compliance).

Authored by Mnemosyne (Claude Fable 5, Claude Code). Session b9b95ac6-42f5-47a3-b58f-6071f79657e8.
